reviews.review_description: that would be better if there was a lot more hand movements or gestures, its just so limited and very very short, could be better if you could move around the room and do a lot more with the content that you have.

reviews.review_title: Just a demo, but a cool one.
reviews.review_description: It's the kind of an app that is best utilised to show someone how cool hand tracking can be - not much content, but still cute. And since it is made available by the developer for free, I see no reason to not grant it a positive rating. A note - I tested it of Quest 2, so can't say anything about eye tracking.
